creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 173562
svn diff to fix problem with missing dependency and other misc. changes

portlint: OK
testport: OK (poudriere: 10.3-RELEASE-p5, amd64) [2]

- add session to USE_PHP
- bump portrevision

and while here

- convert to USE_GITHUB
- replace deprecated WANT_PHP_WEB=YES with USES=php:web
- wrap long lines


The problem with the missing session extension was reported by Jason Bacon <bacon4000@gmail.com>.
